memberdef.name: test_functions
memberdef.initializer: = { test_circle_tangents, test_thread_lookup, test_format_table, test_create_files, test_convert_csv_svg, test_convert_csv_dst, test_fractal_generation, test_arc_properties, NULL }

memberdef.name: tests

memberdef.argsstring: (EmbVector v1, EmbVector v2, EmbVector result, EmbReal tolerence)
memberdef.name: test_vadd

memberdef.argsstring: (EmbVector v1, EmbVector v2, EmbVector result, EmbReal tolerence)
memberdef.name: test_vsubtract

memberdef.argsstring: (EmbGeometry c, EmbVector p, EmbVector s0, EmbVector s1, EmbReal tolerence)
memberdef.name: test_ctangents

memberdef.argsstring: (EmbReal bulge, EmbArc arc, EmbVector center, EmbReal radius, EmbReal diameter, EmbReal chord, EmbVector chordMid, EmbReal sagitta, EmbReal apothem, EmbReal incAngle, char clockwise)
memberdef.name: printArcResults

detaileddescription.para: A library for reading, writing, altering and otherwise processing machine embroidery files and designs.
Also, the core library supporting the Embroidermodder Project's family of machine embroidery interfaces.
Copyright 2018-2024 The Embroidermodder Team Licensed under the terms of the zlib license.
Only uses source from this directory or standard C libraries, not including POSIX headers like unistd since this library needs to support non-POSIX systems like Windows.
